# 23 Brazilian fitness influencers to follow on Instagram
by [Paul Boulet](https://www.clickanalytic.com/author/paul/ "Posts by Paul Boulet") | Feb 6, 2024 | Influencer Rankings
[Twitter](https://www.clickanalytic.com/#twitter "Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.clickanalytic.com/#linkedin "LinkedIn")[Facebook](https://www.clickanalytic.com/#facebook "Facebook")[Copy Link](https://www.clickanalytic.com/#copy_link "Copy Link")
Are you looking for the **best Brazilian fitness influencers on Instagram**? Our [influencer marketing platform](https://www.clickanalytic.com/) identified this year’s 23 top fitness creators on Instagram.
**_Psst!_** Here’s a secret tip: don’t forget to grab the free influencer marketing tools  _(like email templates, a contract, a brief, and more)_ at the bottom of this list. 🤫
We crafted these tools to help you make the most of your influencer marketing! 
And they are **100% free**! Now, wasn’t that nice of us?
Well, without any delay, let’s get into our curated list of the top Brazilian fitness creators this year. 
Here’s the ultimate list of the **best fitness Instagram accounts** from Brazil. 👇

## Find the best fitness influencers on Instagram
What metrics did we use to find the trendiest fitness creators in Brazil? 
We asked our [influencer marketing platform](https://www.clickanalytic.com/) to find influencers with these metrics:
👉 **Followers: Between 100K and 1M**
These fitness influencers fit snugly in that micro-influencer space where they can wow crowds and convert them into sales.
👉 **Engagement rate: Above 5%**
Nobody wants to work with a dull influencer or one with fake followers. Who’s got time to use a [fake follower checker](https://www.clickanalytic.com/fake-follower-checker-top-strategies/?track=blogpost)? 
We used our platform to analyse the audience and ensure they engaged with the content. The higher the engagement, the better.
👉 **Audience interest: Above 30%**
That’s right. Our platform further analysed the audience of each fitness creator. 
_Why?_
To ensure the audience is interested in: Fitness and health.
👉 **Activity level: Active**
We also used our platform to find **active fitness influencers**. There are no duds here.
👉 **Growth: On the up!**
All these fitness influencers have had an audience **growth of 20% or more** over the last couple of months. 
_What does it mean?_
These creators are trending, and their **audiences are growing**!
